description: Deed of manumission for a female slave, given by Yefet b. Yosef. Location: Cairo. Dated: Tuesday, 2[.] Shevaṭ 1341 Seleucid, which is 1030 CE. The slave's name is missing; a large piece from the middle of the document seems to have been deliberately cut away. The manumitted woman recieved a new name upon manumission - מברכה (mubaraka?). A portion of one witness signature is preserved. On verso there are pen trials in both Arabic and Hebrew script. Edition in Yagur dissertation, #10
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
